component.name: Lapcare
component.summary: Battery health, firmware updates and diagnostics for ThinkPads

description.p: Lapcare gives ThinkPad owners the system insight they lost when they left Lenovo Vantage behind: hardware information, battery health and wear analysis, firmware updates via fwupd/LVFS, storage health, one-click diagnostics, and exportable diagnostic reports — in one native window.

Lapcare wraps the excellent hardware tooling Linux already has (fwupd, UPower, smartctl, sysfs) behind one coherent, modern interface. Every feature degrades gracefully on missing tools or unsupported hardware.
Milestone M4: storage health, diagnostics, and report export.

ul.li: Storage page: disk inventory with SMART/NVMe health after one authorization prompt
One-click diagnostics: battery wear, storage, firmware currency, temperatures, disk space
Experimental health score on the Dashboard with per-signal confidence
Diagnostic report export (Markdown/HTML/JSON), identifiers excluded by default
New polkit-mediated privileged helper (one read-only verb) for SMART data

description.p: Milestone M3, the beta: firmware updates via fwupd/LVFS — device list with available upgrades, metadata refresh, guided update flow with battery preconditions, progress, and reboot handling.
Milestone M2, the first public alpha: battery health and wear analysis — live status, health classification, wear history with chart, dual-battery support.
Milestone M1: system overview and hardware information — Dashboard and Hardware pages with live data. Pre-alpha.
Milestone M0: project skeleton and development rails. Not a usable release.
